description: Hydra OTel drill-down — pick a hydra.cycle_id and see planner prompt + response side-by-side with the executor spans for that cycle. Issue #207, Tier-3. Pair with `grafana-hydra-overview.json`. The `cycle_id` template variable is meant to be passed in via dashboard link from the Hydra dashboard (see `HYDRA_TRACE_UI_URL` in docs/reference.md).

panels.title: All spans for hydra.cycle_id = ${cycle_id}
panels.description: Every agent call in the cycle. Order top-to-bottom is planner → preflight/high-risk-review → executor → fixer. Click a span to see prompt + response in the right-hand panel.

panels.title: Planner spans (prompt + response)
panels.description: Planner spans for this cycle. Codex CLI logs the user prompt as a span event when `[otel] log_user_prompt = true` is set in `~/.codex/config.toml` (see scripts/otel/codex-config.example.toml).

panels.title: Executor spans (prompt + response)
panels.description: Executor spans for this cycle. Compare prompts side-by-side with the planner panel to debug preflight abandonment, planner/executor drift, or scope-out violations without touching journalctl.

panels.title: Fixer + high-risk-review spans
panels.description: Only populated when the cycle ran the fixer or high-risk review. Empty traces here = neither ran.

list.name: cycle_id
list.label: hydra.cycle_id
list.description: Paste a cycle ID from the Hydra dashboard (Cycles page) or from journalctl. The dashboard's per-row "traces ↗" link will populate this automatically when HYDRA_TRACE_UI_URL points here.

title: Hydra — Cycle drill-down (hydra.cycle_id)
